summary: Average recording with muddy bass and low levels; no clear show details
review: The sole review points out a muddy bass and overall low levels, suggesting the audio is not very clear. Aside from these technical shortcomings, there are no comments on the performance itself, leaving the musical quality uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it rates the show 3 stars and mentions recording issues but provides no insight into performance, so rating is based mainly on the modest star score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Bass described as muddy; overall levels are low, indicating a lack of clarity and balance in the mix.
